# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in nnuikit, please report it responsibly:

1. **Do NOT** open a public GitHub issue
2. Email: harshparmar0421@gmail.com
3. Include: description, steps to reproduce, potential impact

I will respond within 48 hours and work on a fix.

## Scope

nnuikit is a UI component library — components are copied into your project. Security concerns may include:
- XSS vulnerabilities in component rendering
- Unsafe defaults in accessibility attributes
- CLI command injection in the `nnuikit` CLI tool
- Dependency vulnerabilities

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| Latest  | Yes       |
